title: pimelea trichostachya
intro: Pimelea trichostachya, also known as Rough-stemmed Rice Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is native to Australia and is a shrub-like plant with clusters of small white flowers. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with studies indicating potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves and flowers of Pimelea trichostachya can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and teas, which may offer health benefits including reducing inflammation and supporting immune function.
